a.text: site.yml
play #1 (Provision Infrastructure VMs on ProxMox Hypervisors): 4
play #2 (Wait for SSH Connectivity on New VMs): 4
play #3 (Deploy GitLab Server): 1
play #4 (Deploy Zabbix Monitoring Server): 1
play #5 (Configure Zabbix Agents and Register Monitored Nodes): 4
[role] proxmox_vm
